tick_over_tick_delta_vs_1130.interpretation: Two pre-armed triggers fire CLEANLY at this tick. (i) Trigger I (Power-cluster RE-ARMED): TORNTPOWER admission is the 4th Power-sector name on full fill, and Power exposure jumps to 19.77% (2.77 pp ABOVE the 17% threshold) — both legs of the spec fire simultaneously. (ii) Trigger N (BUY-without-SELL): TORNTPOWER BUY-fill at 11:45:12 occurs BEFORE the GRANULES SELL-fill at 11:45:44, satisfying the spec-armed cadence-quality complement to the now-binding 0.65 deployment cap. Behavioral pattern noteworthy: TORNTPOWER was SOLD at Day-3 10:12 (+₹1,834 win) and is now RE-BOUGHT at the same 28 @ 1810 entry — a buy-back-what-you-just-sold pattern that is itself a quality signal. Combined with re-emergence of a 4-name Power cluster (echoing the Day-1 binge cluster that originally drove 0.75/0.70 deployed-cap interventions), the strategy is plainly testing the perimeter created by the 11:30 deployment cap by trading old slots for new ones. Risk level held at MEDIUM (not raised to HIGH) because composite distress meta-trigger D remains entirely dormant — book P&L is in fact POSITIVE at +₹89.58 realized (GRANULES win > AUBANK loss), no single-name at distress, strategy demonstrably NOT silent.

findings: TORNTPOWER BUY 28 @ ₹1810 = ₹50,680 (5.06% of capital) FILLED at 11:45:12 — the 5th BUY of the session and the 4th Power-sector name on full fill. Power-sector exposure on full fill 14.73% → 19.77% (+5.04 pp tick-over-tick), a clean 2.77 pp BREACH of the 17% Trigger I threshold.

Trigger I (Power-cluster, RE-ARMED) FIRES on BOTH legs: 4th Power name admitted AND Power exposure 19.77% > 17%. Pattern echoes the Day-1 4-name Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) that originally drove the 0.75/0.70 deployed-cap interventions and required the Day-3 SELLs to decongest.

Trigger N (BUY-without-SELL discipline, NEW from 11:30) FIRES cleanly: TORNTPOWER BUY-fill at 11:45:12 came WITHOUT an intervening SELL between 11:30 and that fill. The GRANULES SELL came 32 seconds AFTER (at 11:45:44) — BUY-then-SELL ordering, the inverse of the SELL-before-BUY discipline at high deployment.

Trigger F (RE-ARMED 5th-BUY leg) FIRES: TORNTPOWER is the 5th BUY of the session (TATAPOWER 10:13 → INDUSINDBK 10:42 → HINDZINC 10:42 → POWERGRID 11:13 → TORNTPOWER 11:45). Trigger F's action overlaps Trigger N's (both → consider min_confidence 0.62), so a single lever fire satisfies both.

Behavioral signal: TORNTPOWER was SOLD at Day-3 10:12 (+₹1,834 win), now RE-BOUGHT today at the same 28 @ 1810 entry — a buy-back-within-24h pattern. Combined with the simultaneous re-emergence of a 4-name Power cluster, this signals the strategy is testing the perimeter created by the 11:30 deployment cap by recycling old slots into new ones rather than holding cash.

actions_taken: Tightened max_sector_pct from 0.25 to 0.22 — fired pre-armed Trigger I (RE-ARMED) cleanly: 4th Power name (TORNTPOWER) admitted AND Power exposure 19.77% > 17% threshold. Power retains 2.23 pp buffer, FMCG 5.26 pp; BFSI 22.45% becomes a grandfathered breach (0.45 pp), mechanically blocking ANY further BFSI admission until BFSI mark drops below 22%. Non-punitive: no current sector exposure invalidated; all in-flight OPEN orders grandfathered.

Tightened min_confidence from 0.60 to 0.62 — fired pre-armed Trigger N cleanly: TORNTPOWER BUY-fill at 11:45:12 came WITHOUT intervening SELL between 11:30 and that fill (GRANULES SELL fill came 32 seconds LATER at 11:45:44). Trigger F's RE-ARMED 5th-BUY leg also fires on the same admission, with overlapping action. Step calibrated +2 pp (NOT +5 pp to 0.65) given closed-trade sample is still only 4 (n=4 has no statistical signal yet) and to avoid over-rotation alongside the simultaneous max_sector_pct fire. Non-punitive: applies to NEW admissions only; all existing holdings and OPEN orders grandfathered.

Risk level HELD at MEDIUM (not raised to HIGH or CRITICAL). Drivers held: (i) composite distress meta-trigger D dormant on all 3 legs — book P&L positive at +₹89.58 realized, no single-name distress, strategy not silent; (ii) two simultaneous lever fires this tick is symmetric with the 11:30 simultaneous-fire pattern — the framework is responding mechanically to spec-armed triggers without over-rotation; (iii) the cadence/cluster pattern is being actively gated by the now-binding deployment cap and the new sector cap; the system is operating as designed.
